transitions.name: Production Success
Machine Fail
Start Production
Finish Repair
Call Technician
transitions.lambdaCode:
// Always enabled: as soon as a machine is broken we dispatch a technician.
export default Lambda(() => true)

transitions.name: Technician Ready
Start Repair

differentialEquations.name: Reparation Dynamics
Production Dynamics
Technician Travel Dynamics

metrics.name: Good products
metrics.description: Cumulative count of products that passed and shipped.

metrics.name: Defective products
metrics.description: Cumulative count of products that came out defective.

metrics.name: Yield
metrics.description: Share of finished products that were good rather than defective.

metrics.name: Machines down
metrics.description: Machines that are broken, waiting for a technician, or being repaired (i.e. not producing).

metrics.name: Average machine damage
metrics.description: Mean damage ratio across machines that are available or currently producing.

scenarios.name: Default Production
scenarios.description: Configurable raw material, machine count, and initial machine damage.
